name: Spicy Grilled Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Oriental Sesame Salad Dressing Mix
1 teaspoon hot pepper sauce, or more to taste
1 pound fresh shitake or button mushrooms, stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a cruet or small bowl, mix vinegar, soy sauce, salad dressing mix, oil, hot pepper sauce, and minced garlic as directed on the envelope.
2. Pour the mixture over the mushrooms in a large bowl. Let stand for 30 minutes to marinate.
3. Drain the mushrooms, reserving the dressing mixture.
4. Place the mushrooms on a greased grill or on a rack of broiler pan, 3-5 inches from heat.
5. Grill or broil the mushrooms for 3-5 minutes on each side, turning and brushing frequently with the reserved dressing mixture until tender and slightly crisp.
6. Makes 4-6 servings.
Prep Time: 5 minutes plus marinating
Grilling/Broiling Time: 10 minutes
